locations.name: Mount Kitanglad

locations.name: 阿波火山
locations.summary: 阿波火山（他加祿語：Bundok Apo）是一座位于菲律宾棉兰老岛东南部的活火山，海拔2,954公尺，为菲律宾最高峰。达沃市位于其东北方30公里处。近百年未喷发，有硫磺矿，覆盖着热带硬木林。 主峰及周围已经开辟为阿波火山国家公园（面积80…

locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: Philippine trogon
relations.evidence: Occurs in a many protected areas in Bataan National Park, Bulusan Volcano Natural Park, Angat Watershed Forest Reserve, Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park on Luzon, Pasonanca Natural Park, Mount Kitanglad, Mount Apo on Mindanao; Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol; and Samar Island Natural Park in Samar

relations.subject: Philippine trogon
relations.evidence: It is found in tropical moist lowland forest and the lower reaches of tropical moist mountain forest up to 2,000 meters above sea level but is most common under 600 meters above sea level
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Philippine trogon
relations.evidence: While not a threatened species, its population is declining due to habitat loss and hunting
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Philippine trogon
relations.evidence: While not a threatened species, its population is declining due to habitat loss and hunting
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: Philippine trogon
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
